name: CyberControl: Another Life
short_description: An interactive cyberpunk drama where you live the life of a border officer in a brutal future ruled by tyranny, manipulation, and survival. Check documents, approve or deny entry, build relationships, and face nonlinear stories.
detailed_description:
"CyberControl: Another Life" is 20 hours of interactive drama set in a cyberpunk world, where you take on the role of a border officer in a harsh future full of tyranny, manipulation, and survival. Check documents, skip or refuse people, start relationships and take part in a variety of non-linear stories. But remember that every choice you make is not just a decision, it's a verdict. You will be given a chance to understand how much you can suffer for survival and how far you are willing to go to save those you love. There are no bright sides or wrong decisions in this world, there are only choices that you have to make.

***CREATE YOUR OWN CHARACTER AND CHOOSE A PERSONAL PATH***

In a world where technology has become an integral part of life, a person's personality is determined not only by his actions, but also by the choices he makes. From the very beginning, you will get the opportunity to create a unique character by choosing his appearance and defining his inner qualities. Will you be a cold-blooded performer, keeping order, or a person with a deep sense of compassion, looking for meaning and justice in this cruel world?

***NON-LINEAR STORIES: SOLUTIONS THAT CHANGE EVERYTHING***

Your main task is to check documents, and it depends on your choice who will pass through the border post. In your hands is not just a stamp, but a person's life: behind each passport lies a personal story full of secrets and tragedies. You can be a hero to one, but a ruthless monster to another. Your decisions can lead to salvation, but they can also cause death. Every choice leads to a new story, and every act of kindness or cruelty resonates in this world in its own way.

*** LOVE AND BETRAYAL***

The world is full of loneliness and despair, but there is still room for feelings in it. Make acquaintances, explore friendships, experience love, but remember that in this cruel world betrayal is not uncommon: everyone hides their secrets, so you can not be sure what will happen tomorrow. These connections can both save you and cause your downfall. Loyalty can be betrayed, and love can be destroyed. Caught at the crossroads between personality and duty, you must decide how far you are willing to go for the sake of those you love.

***34 ENDINGS — ONE TRAGIC DESTINY***

With each decision you make, you change not only your own destiny, but also the destiny of others, and this domino effect can lead to the most unexpected consequences. In one life you will be able to save your loved ones, in another you will be able to destroy everything that is dear to you. In some cases, you will never be able to go back, and in others you will find yourself at a crossroads, where every action will lead to a new tragedy. Every life is a dramatic story in which it is impossible to guess which path will be the right one, because any choice has its price.

***LIFE AND TRAGEDY IN THE WORLD OF CYBERPUNK***

You will have to live in a tragic world where light is intertwined with darkness, and you cannot always distinguish where one ends and the other begins. Your emotions are what the world will want to take away from you first. There are no right or wrong ways, there are only consequences, and only those who are willing to sacrifice their principles for the sake of survival will survive. But at what stage will you start to lose yourself? Every decision can lead to unpredictable results. And when you look back to understand what led to the disaster, you may find that it is already too late...

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
